airport_memberships.name: Priority Pass
airport_memberships.tip: Check if your card provides unlimited or limited visits. Some cards cap at 4-6 visits/year.

airport_memberships.name: DreamFolks
airport_memberships.tip: Primary lounge program for Indian domestic airports. Most premium cards include this.

hotel_memberships.name: Taj Epicure
benefits: 25% off on dining at Taj hotels
hotel_memberships.tip: Worth it if you dine at Taj properties 3+ times a year. ₹10K fee is easily recovered.

hotel_memberships.name: Club Marriott
benefits: 20% off on food and beverages at Marriott hotels
Complimentary cake and room upgrade on birthdays
hotel_memberships.tip: Excellent value if you frequent Marriott restaurants. Sunday brunches alone can justify the fee.

hotel_memberships.name: IHG One Rewards Ambassador
benefits: Guaranteed room upgrade to best available
hotel_memberships.tip: The free weekend night alone covers the fee. Stack with Diamond status for maximum benefits.

travel_memberships.name: Amazon Prime
travel_benefits: Amazon Pay ICICI card 5% cashback on Amazon
Flight and hotel deals on Amazon Travel
Prime Video for in-flight entertainment downloads
travel_memberships.tip: Amazon Pay ICICI + Prime = 5% back on all Amazon spend. Good for travel accessories.

golf_memberships.name: Card Golf Programs
golf_memberships.details: 6-12 complimentary rounds per year across premium golf courses
golf_memberships.tip: Most users don't utilize this. Each round would cost ₹3,000-5,000 green fees.

insurance_coverage.name: Travel Insurance via Cards
insurance_coverage.tip: You likely don't need separate travel insurance if you have HDFC Infinia or Axis Magnus. Check policy terms.
